Steam Deck HID report descriptor — byte-level annotation
=========================================================

Source: src/test/fixtures/golden/steam_deck_hid_descriptor.bin
Generator: UhidDescriptorBuilder.buildFromOutput(devices/valve/steam-deck.toml)
Reference: USB HID Usage Tables 1.11, Appendix A (Device Class Definition §6.2.2.4)

Purpose: a human-auditable reference that allows a reviewer to verify the
builder's output against HID spec without trusting the builder. Pair it with
`golden invariants: Steam Deck HID descriptor parses as balanced HID 1.11
item stream` in `src/io/uhid_descriptor.zig` — the test parses the .bin as
HID 1.11 short items and asserts collection balance, report-id uniqueness,
and byte alignment.

Each line: `offset | bytes | HID item | notes`

offset | bytes          | item
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
                                 === Prologue ===
0x0000 | 05 01          | Usage Page (Generic Desktop)
0x0002 | 09 05          | Usage (Game Pad)
0x0004 | A1 01          | Collection (Application)
0x0006 | 85 01          | Report ID (1) — main input report

                                 === 1. Buttons (Button Page) ===
0x0008 | 05 09          | Usage Page (Button)
0x000A | 09 01          | Usage (Button 1)  | A / BTN_SOUTH
0x000C | 09 02          | Usage (Button 2)  | B / BTN_EAST
0x000E | 09 05          | Usage (Button 5)  | X / BTN_WEST
0x0010 | 09 04          | Usage (Button 4)  | Y / BTN_NORTH
0x0012 | 09 07          | Usage (Button 7)  | LB / BTN_TL
0x0014 | 09 08          | Usage (Button 8)  | RB / BTN_TR
0x0016 | 09 09          | Usage (Button 9)  | LT / BTN_TL2
0x0018 | 09 0A          | Usage (Button 10) | RT / BTN_TR2
0x001A | 09 0C          | Usage (Button 12) | Start / BTN_START
0x001C | 09 0B          | Usage (Button 11) | Select / BTN_SELECT
0x001E | 09 0D          | Usage (Button 13) | Home / BTN_MODE
0x0020 | 09 0E          | Usage (Button 14) | LS / BTN_THUMBL
0x0022 | 09 0F          | Usage (Button 15) | RS / BTN_THUMBR
0x0024 | 09 11          | Usage (Button 17) | M1 / BTN_TRIGGER_HAPPY1
0x0026 | 09 12          | Usage (Button 18) | M2 / BTN_TRIGGER_HAPPY2
0x0028 | 09 13          | Usage (Button 19) | M3 / BTN_TRIGGER_HAPPY3
0x002A | 09 14          | Usage (Button 20) | M4 / BTN_TRIGGER_HAPPY4
0x002C | 15 00          | Logical Minimum (0)
0x002E | 25 01          | Logical Maximum (1)
0x0030 | 75 01          | Report Size (1 bit)
0x0032 | 95 11          | Report Count (17 bits) — matches steam-deck.toml [output.buttons] count
0x0034 | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs) — the button bitmap
0x0036 | 75 01          | Report Size (1 bit)
0x0038 | 95 07          | Report Count (7 bits) — padding to realign to byte boundary (17 + 7 = 24 = 3 bytes)
0x003A | 81 03          | Input (Const, Var, Abs) — padding

                                 === 2. Hat switch (dpad) ===
0x003C | 05 01          | Usage Page (Generic Desktop)
0x003E | 09 39          | Usage (Hat switch)
0x0040 | 15 00          | Logical Minimum (0)
0x0042 | 25 07          | Logical Maximum (7) — 8 directions, 8 = null
0x0044 | 35 00          | Physical Minimum (0)
0x0046 | 46 3B 01       | Physical Maximum (315 degrees)
0x0049 | 65 14          | Unit (Eng Rot: Degrees)
0x004B | 75 04          | Report Size (4 bits)
0x004D | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x004F | 81 42          | Input (Data, Var, Abs, Null) — 0x42: Null bit set, allows invalid=8
0x0051 | 65 00          | Unit (None) — reset unit scope so following axes aren't degrees
0x0053 | 75 04          | Report Size (4 bits)
0x0055 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x0057 | 81 03          | Input (Const, Var, Abs) — 4-bit padding to realign to byte boundary

                                 === 3. Left stick X ===
0x0059 | 05 01          | Usage Page (Generic Desktop)
0x005B | 09 30          | Usage (X)
0x005D | 16 00 80       | Logical Minimum (-32768)
0x0060 | 26 FF 7F       | Logical Maximum (32767)
0x0063 | 75 10          | Report Size (16 bits)
0x0065 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x0067 | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs)

                                 === 4. Left stick Y ===
0x0069 | 05 01          | Usage Page (Generic Desktop)
0x006B | 09 31          | Usage (Y)
0x006D | 16 00 80       | Logical Minimum (-32768)
0x0070 | 26 FF 7F       | Logical Maximum (32767)
0x0073 | 75 10          | Report Size (16 bits)
0x0075 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x0077 | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs)

                                 === 5. Right stick X ===
0x0079 | 05 01          | Usage Page (Generic Desktop)
0x007B | 09 33          | Usage (Rx)
0x007D | 16 00 80       | Logical Minimum (-32768)
0x0080 | 26 FF 7F       | Logical Maximum (32767)
0x0083 | 75 10          | Report Size (16 bits)
0x0085 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x0087 | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs)

                                 === 6. Right stick Y ===
0x0089 | 05 01          | Usage Page (Generic Desktop)
0x008B | 09 34          | Usage (Ry)
0x008D | 16 00 80       | Logical Minimum (-32768)
0x0090 | 26 FF 7F       | Logical Maximum (32767)
0x0093 | 75 10          | Report Size (16 bits)
0x0095 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x0097 | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs)

                                 === 7. Left trigger (Z) ===
0x0099 | 05 01          | Usage Page (Generic Desktop)
0x009B | 09 32          | Usage (Z)
0x009D | 15 00          | Logical Minimum (0)
0x009F | 26 FF 00       | Logical Maximum (255)
0x00A2 | 75 08          | Report Size (8 bits)
0x00A4 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x00A6 | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs)

                                 === 8. Right trigger (Rz) ===
0x00A8 | 05 01          | Usage Page (Generic Desktop)
0x00AA | 09 35          | Usage (Rz)
0x00AC | 15 00          | Logical Minimum (0)
0x00AE | 26 FF 00       | Logical Maximum (255)
0x00B1 | 75 08          | Report Size (8 bits)
0x00B3 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x00B5 | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs)

                                 === 9. Touchpad (Logical Collection, two fingers) ===
0x00B7 | 05 0D          | Usage Page (Digitizer)
0x00B9 | 09 05          | Usage (Touch Pad)
0x00BB | A1 02          | Collection (Logical)

                                 === Finger 0 ===
0x00BD | 09 22          | Usage (Finger)
0x00BF | A1 02          | Collection (Logical)
0x00C1 | 09 42          | Usage (Tip Switch)
0x00C3 | 15 00          | Logical Minimum (0)
0x00C5 | 25 01          | Logical Maximum (1)
0x00C7 | 75 01          | Report Size (1 bit)
0x00C9 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x00CB | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs) — tip switch (contact state)
0x00CD | 75 07          | Report Size (7 bits)
0x00CF | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x00D1 | 81 03          | Input (Const, Var, Abs) — padding
0x00D3 | 05 01          | Usage Page (Generic Desktop)
0x00D5 | 09 30          | Usage (X)
0x00D7 | 16 00 80       | Logical Minimum (-32768)
0x00DA | 26 FF 7F       | Logical Maximum (32767)
0x00DD | 75 10          | Report Size (16 bits)
0x00DF | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x00E1 | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs)
0x00E3 | 09 31          | Usage (Y)
0x00E5 | 16 00 80       | Logical Minimum (-32768)
0x00E8 | 26 FF 7F       | Logical Maximum (32767)
0x00EB | 75 10          | Report Size (16 bits)
0x00ED | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x00EF | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs)
0x00F1 | 05 0D          | Usage Page (Digitizer)
0x00F3 | C0             | End Collection (Finger 0)

                                 === Finger 1 ===
0x00F4 | 09 22          | Usage (Finger)
0x00F6 | A1 02          | Collection (Logical)
0x00F8 | 09 42          | Usage (Tip Switch)
0x00FA | 15 00          | Logical Minimum (0)
0x00FC | 25 01          | Logical Maximum (1)
0x00FE | 75 01          | Report Size (1 bit)
0x0100 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x0102 | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs)
0x0104 | 75 07          | Report Size (7 bits)
0x0106 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x0108 | 81 03          | Input (Const, Var, Abs) — padding
0x010A | 05 01          | Usage Page (Generic Desktop)
0x010C | 09 30          | Usage (X)
0x010E | 16 00 80       | Logical Minimum (-32768)
0x0111 | 26 FF 7F       | Logical Maximum (32767)
0x0114 | 75 10          | Report Size (16 bits)
0x0116 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x0118 | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs)
0x011A | 09 31          | Usage (Y)
0x011C | 16 00 80       | Logical Minimum (-32768)
0x011F | 26 FF 7F       | Logical Maximum (32767)
0x0122 | 75 10          | Report Size (16 bits)
0x0124 | 95 01          | Report Count (1)
0x0126 | 81 02          | Input (Data, Var, Abs)
0x0128 | 05 0D          | Usage Page (Digitizer)
0x012A | C0             | End Collection (Finger 1)
0x012B | C0             | End Collection (Touch Pad)

                                 === 10. Rumble output report (Vendor-Defined) ===
0x012C | 06 00 FF       | Usage Page (Vendor-Defined 0xFF00)
0x012F | 85 02          | Report ID (2) — rumble output report
0x0131 | 09 01          | Usage (Vendor Usage 1)
0x0133 | 15 00          | Logical Minimum (0)
0x0135 | 26 FF 00       | Logical Maximum (255)
0x0138 | 75 08          | Report Size (8 bits)
0x013A | 95 02          | Report Count (2) — strong + weak magnitudes
0x013C | 91 02          | Output (Data, Var, Abs)

                                 === End Application Collection ===
0x013E | C0             | End Collection

--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Total bytes: 0x13F = 319

Invariants validated by the structural test:
  * Collection opens == closes (each A1 has a matching C0)
  * Exactly one Report ID appears on the input side (0x85 0x01) — the
    0x85 0x02 at 0x012F names the rumble OUTPUT report and is expected.
  * Prologue is Usage Page (Generic Desktop) + Usage (Game Pad) +
    Collection (Application).
  * Sum of Report Size × Report Count across all Input items is a
    multiple of 8 (byte-aligned aggregate).
